'''gashuzu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyanophore|cyanophore]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-sh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyanophore|cyanophore]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gashuzu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæshizith|gæshizith]] || [[word:gæshizij|gæshizij]] || [[word:gæshizish|gæshizish]] || [[word:gæshizi|gæshizi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gashushuzuth|gashushuzuth]] || [[word:gashushuzuj|gashushuzuj]] || [[word:gashushuzush|gashushuzush]] || [[word:gashushuzu|gashushuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gashuzuth|gashuzuth]] || [[word:gashuzuj|gashuzuj]] || [[word:gashuzush|gashuzush]] || [[word:gashuzu|gashuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gashufzuth|gashufzuth]] || [[word:gashufzuj|gashufzuj]] || [[word:gashufzush|gashufzush]] || [[word:gashufzuf|gashufzuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gashuzuthu|gashuzuthu]] || [[word:gashuzuju|gashuzuju]] || [[word:gashuzushu|gashuzushu]] || [[word:gashuzuku|gashuzuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gashuzuth|gashuzuth]] || [[word:gashuzuj|gashuzuj]] || [[word:gashuzush|gashuzush]] || [[word:gashuzu|gashuzu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gashuzuthul|gashuzuthul]] || [[word:gashuzujul|gashuzujul]] || [[word:gashuzushul|gashuzushul]] || [[word:gashuzukul|gashuzukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gashuzuthuthu|gashuzuthuthu]] || [[word:gashuzujuju|gashuzujuju]] || [[word:gashuzushushu|gashuzushushu]] || [[word:gashuzuku|gashuzuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gashuzuthun|gashuzuthun]] || [[word:gashuzujun|gashuzujun]] || [[word:gashuzushun|gashuzushun]] || [[word:gashuzukun|gashuzukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gashuzuthuoro|gashuzuthuoro]] || [[word:gashuzujuoro|gashuzujuoro]] || [[word:gashuzushuoro|gashuzushuoro]] || [[word:gashuzukuoro|gashuzukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
